name: Continuity Power Recovery Checklist
description: Build a startup order for restoring a minimal stable shelter power loop.
script:
critical_loads = ['lighting', 'radios', 'water']
if 'critical_loads' in inputs:
  critical_loads = list(inputs['critical_loads'])
checklist = [
  'Inspect cables, fuses, battery temperature, and grounds before energizing.',
  'Bring up only the smallest essential load set first.',
  'Log voltage and state-of-charge after each load change.',
  'Keep a rollback order ready before reconnecting noncritical circuits.'
]
emit('built power recovery checklist')
result = {
  'critical_loads': critical_loads,
  'summary': 'Power recovery checklist prepared.',
  'checklist': checklist,
}
